# comfyui_runway_image_to_video_node_gen4 (Resource)

Generate a video from a single starting frame using Gen4 Turbo model. Before diving in, review these best practices to ensure that your input selections will set your generation up for success: https://help.runwayml.com/hc/en-us/articles/37327109429011-Creating-with-Gen-4-Video. [api node/video/Runway]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `duration` (String) Input: COMBO
- `prompt` (String) Input: STRING default:
- `ratio` (String) Input: COMBO
- `seed` (Number) Input: INT default: 0
- `start_frame` (String) Input: IMAGE (link)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type
- `video_output` (String) Output: VIDEO (slot 0)
